text.title: Agent Postmortem Template (Agent-as-Defendant) Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply agent-postmortem-template. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Pull the trace and model pin.
step.description: Input: incident alert. Action: Read observability stack.. Output: trace pulled.

step.name: Diff system prompt vs last green eval.
step.description: Input: trace + git history. Action: Render diff.. Output: prompt diff.
step.note: Step 2. Required input: trace + git history.

step.name: Attribute root cause to one of six layers.
step.description: Input: diff + replay. Action: Apply r3.. Output: attribution.

step.name: Define regression case; run baseline eval.
step.description: Input: attribution. Action: Author case + run eval.. Output: eval before.

step.name: Ship fix; re-run eval; verify green.
step.description: Input: fix. Action: Run eval.. Output: eval after.

step.name: Attach replay artefacts; file trace gaps as action items.
step.description: Input: all above. Action: Author postmortem.. Output: postmortem.md.
